creator: jacobsm@gate.net
text:
After todays CVSUP and portupgrade to glib20 2.12.8 the evolution mil package is falling with the following message;

GLib-ERROR **: gmem.c:154: failed to allocate 1367006178 bytes
aborting...
Abort trap: 6 (core dumped)

Evolution worked prior to the portupgrade of glib20

Mark Jacobs

How-To-Repeat: Update glib20 to latest level in ports and execute evolution email program.
